plugins.name: agents-md-ops
plugins.description: Toolkit for AGENTS.md covering the draft → grow → maintain lifecycle: draft-agents-md (draft generation from project analysis), refine-boundaries (error-driven Boundaries accumulation), audit-agents-md (anti-pattern diagnosis and consent-based improvement). Bridge support for Claude Code and Gemini CLI included.

plugins.name: misc
plugins.description: Miscellaneous personal skills: pdf-parser, claude-hook-notify-setup, docs-to-md (fetch tech docs as local Markdown), fsd-docs (Feature-Sliced Design v2.1 knowledge pack), handoff (generate agent-to-agent brief from current conversation).
